speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Oi, [username]! Meat time! We're making Amritsari Murgh, and I’m already hungry! Let’s gooo!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: First, toss that chicken in a big bowl. More chicken means more happiness!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Add ginger-garlic paste, kasuri methi, coriander powder, degi chili, turmeric, and ghee… ALL the flavor!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Now add salt, curd, and oil. Mix it well! Don’t be shy—coat every piece!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Let it rest for 20–30 minutes. I know waiting is torture… but it’ll be worth it!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Now let’s make the SUPER MASALA! Gather peppercorns, coriander seeds, big cardamom, small cardamom, cloves, fenugreek seeds, cumin, mustard!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Grind everything into a fine powder. Like smashing enemies but tastier!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Time to roast the chicken! Heat oil on a tawa.

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Add the marinated chicken and roast both sides until it’s tender and smells amazing!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Transfer it to a bowl. DON’T eat it yet… we still need gravy!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Let’s build the main curry now! Heat oil in a handi.

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Add bay leaves, green chillies, onions, and butter… so much butter… YES!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Sauté until the onions turn golden. That’s when the magic starts!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Add the prepared masala and chopped tomatoes. Mix mix mix!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Add water, curd, and salt. Let everything cook together—like a pirate crew bonding!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Now add the roasted chicken! This is the part I was waiting for!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Add a bit of water, cover, and cook for 10–12 minutes. The aroma… I can’t take it!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Finish with butter and chopped coriander. That’s the final flavor punch!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Transfer everything to a bowl. It looks SO GOOD!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Garnish with a coriander sprig. Fancy food makes me extra hungry!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Serve hot with roti. [username], hurry and eat it before I do!

speaker: Luffy
dialogue_text: Call me when you need [username]!
